summary.en: Myanmar does not have an EU-style battery regulation for industrial BESS. For battery energy storage systems, MSTRD conformity evidence may be requested where the product falls within a regulated or standards-assessed category, while MS or IEC-based evidence such as IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 is commonly more relevant than a purely China GB report.
summary.zh: 缅甸没有类似欧盟的工业储能电池法规。对电池储能系统，如产品落入受监管或需标准评定的类别，可能需要提供MSTRD合格证据；MS或IEC体系证据，如IEC 62619和IEC 62933，通常比单纯中国GB报告更相关。
summary.zht: 緬甸沒有類似歐盟的工業儲能電池法規。對電池儲能系統，如產品落入受監管或需標準評定的類別，可能需要提供MSTRD合格證據；MS或IEC體系證據，如IEC 62619和IEC 62933，通常比單純中國GB報告更相關。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar Standards Law and MSTRD conformity practice
Myanmar Standards based on IEC where adopted

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: China GB reports may help describe design and test basis but may not be accepted as Myanmar conformity evidence if MSTRD or a project owner asks for MS or IEC alignment.
gap.zh: 中国GB报告可用于说明设计和测试基础，但如MSTRD或项目业主要求MS或IEC对应证据，未必可直接作为缅甸合格证据。
gap.zht: 中國GB報告可用於說明設計和測試基礎，但如MSTRD或項目業主要求MS或IEC對應證據，未必可直接作為緬甸合格證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mostly voluntary standards; conformity evidence may be required where the product category, importer, tender, or authority brings the BESS in scope.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; market enforcement depends on product configuration and project context.

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology / MSTRD

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare an IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 mapping pack rather than assuming a China GB/T 36276 report alone will satisfy Myanmar buyers or authorities.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应准备IEC 62619和IEC 62933映射文件包，不应假设仅凭中国GB/T 36276报告即可满足缅甸买方或主管机构要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應準備IEC 62619和IEC 62933映射文件包，不應假設僅憑中國GB/T 36276報告即可滿足緬甸買方或主管機構要求。

requirement_topic.en: No Horizontal Battery Carbon Footprint or Battery Passport Regime
requirement_topic.zh: 无横向电池碳足迹或电池护照制度
requirement_topic.zht: 無橫向電池碳足跡或電池護照制度

summary.en: Myanmar has no known horizontal battery carbon footprint declaration, battery passport, or EU Battery Regulation-style lifecycle reporting regime for BESS. Carbon or lifecycle data may still be requested contractually by lenders, international project sponsors, or ESG procurement programs.
summary.zh: 缅甸没有已知适用于储能系统的横向电池碳足迹声明、电池护照或类似欧盟电池法规的全生命周期报告制度。但贷款方、国际项目业主或ESG采购计划仍可能以合同方式要求碳或生命周期数据。
summary.zht: 緬甸沒有已知適用於儲能系統的橫向電池碳足跡聲明、電池護照或類似歐盟電池法規的全生命週期報告制度。但貸款方、國際項目業主或ESG採購計劃仍可能以合約方式要求碳或生命週期數據。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal Myanmar battery carbon footprint regulation identified
Contractual ESG or lender requirements may apply by project

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: Unlike the EU template, there is no Myanmar legal equivalent to carbon footprint declarations or battery passport duties. The gap is contractual readiness, not a general Myanmar statutory duty.
gap.zh: 不同于欧盟模板，缅甸没有与碳足迹声明或电池护照义务相对应的当地法律制度。差距在于合同资料准备，而不是缅甸的一般法定义务。
gap.zht: 不同於歐盟模板，緬甸沒有與碳足跡聲明或電池護照義務相對應的當地法律制度。差距在於合約資料準備，而不是緬甸的一般法定義務。

mandatory_status.target: Not horizontally mandatory in Myanmar; may be project-specific by contract or financing terms.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; carbon footprint evidence is separate from this baseline.

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology / MSTRD

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not import EU Battery Regulation carbon-footprint obligations into the Myanmar column; treat them as lender or buyer add-ons unless a specific tender requires them.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应把欧盟电池法规的碳足迹义务写入缅甸栏目；除非具体招标要求，应视为贷款方或买方附加要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應把歐盟電池法規的碳足跡義務寫入緬甸欄目；除非具體招標要求，應視為貸款方或買方附加要求。

summary.en: Myanmar BESS imports should keep English technical documentation, nameplate data, safety instructions, SDS, test reports, and installation manuals available for importer, customs, MSTRD, utility, and project-owner review. Specific labeling format requirements may be set by the importer, tender, customs classification, or dangerous-goods shipment route.
summary.zh: 缅甸进口储能系统应准备英文技术文件、铭牌数据、安全说明、SDS、测试报告和安装手册，以供进口商、海关、MSTRD、电力单位和项目业主审查。具体标签格式可能由进口商、招标、海关归类或危险品运输路线决定。
summary.zht: 緬甸進口儲能系統應準備英文技術文件、銘牌資料、安全說明、SDS、測試報告和安裝手冊，以供進口商、海關、MSTRD、電力單位和項目業主審查。具體標籤格式可能由進口商、招標、海關歸類或危險品運輸路線決定。

standards_or_laws: UN lithium battery mark and Class 9 label for transport where applicable

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: Chinese domestic labels and Chinese-language manuals alone are usually insufficient for Myanmar import and project review. English documentation and clear model traceability should be prepared.
gap.zh: 仅有中国国内标签和中文说明书通常不足以应对缅甸进口和项目审查。应准备英文文件并确保型号追溯清晰。
gap.zht: 僅有中國國內標籤和中文說明書通常不足以應對緬甸進口和項目審查。應準備英文文件並確保型號追溯清晰。

mandatory_status.target: Documentation is practically required for import, customs, conformity, utility, and project review; exact legal format depends on product scope and route.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; domestic labeling alone should not be treated as Myanmar-ready.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build a bilingual or English technical dossier with model numbers matching invoices, packing lists, test reports, and nameplates.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应建立双语或英文技术档案，并确保型号与发票、装箱单、测试报告和铭牌一致。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應建立雙語或英文技術檔案，並確保型號與發票、裝箱單、測試報告和銘牌一致。

requirement_topic.en: No Horizontal RoHS Restriction for BESS

summary.en: Myanmar has no horizontal RoHS regime equivalent to EU RoHS for BESS or general electrical equipment. Hazardous-substance limits may still appear through buyer specifications, lender ESG requirements, waste rules, or imported-equipment contracts, but they should not be described as a general Myanmar RoHS legal obligation.
summary.zh: 缅甸没有等同欧盟RoHS、适用于储能系统或一般电气设备的横向RoHS制度。有害物质限制仍可能通过买方规格、贷款方ESG要求、废弃物规则或进口设备合同出现，但不应描述为缅甸一般RoHS法定义务。
summary.zht: 緬甸沒有等同歐盟RoHS、適用於儲能系統或一般電氣設備的橫向RoHS制度。有害物質限制仍可能通過買方規格、貸款方ESG要求、廢棄物規則或進口設備合約出現，但不應描述為緬甸一般RoHS法定義務。

standards_or_laws: No horizontal Myanmar RoHS regime identified

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: There is no Myanmar statutory RoHS gap to close. The practical gap is whether the buyer or financer imports EU-style substance requirements into the contract.
gap.zh: 不存在需要弥补的缅甸法定RoHS差距。实际差距在于买方或融资方是否把欧盟式物质限制写入合同。
gap.zht: 不存在需要彌補的緬甸法定RoHS差距。實際差距在於買方或融資方是否把歐盟式物質限制寫入合約。

mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; China RoHS or material declarations are separate from this BESS baseline.

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology / MSTRD

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] State plainly that Myanmar lacks a horizontal RoHS regime; provide substance declarations only when requested by contract, lender, or purchaser.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应明确说明缅甸没有横向RoHS制度；仅在合同、贷款方或采购方要求时提供物质声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應明確說明緬甸沒有橫向RoHS制度；僅在合約、貸款方或採購方要求時提供物質聲明。
